title: The Lushai Hills District (Change of Name) Act, 1954
full_text: The Lushai Hills District (Change of Name) Act, 1954 लुशाई पहाड़ी जिला (नाम-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 1954 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195418 Act Number: 18 Enactment Date: 1954-04-29 Act Year: 1954 Short Title: The Lushai Hills District (Change of Name) Act, 1954 Hindi Title: लुशाई पहाड़ी जिला (नाम-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 1954 Long Title: An Act to change the name of the Lushai Hills District. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-09-1954 Notification: 1st September, 1954, vide notification No. S.R.O. 2832 (E), dated 1st September, 1954, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Lushai Hills District (Change of Name) Act, 1954 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Lushai Hills District to be known as Mizo District. Section 3. Amendment of the Sixth Schedule to the Constitution. Section 4. Reference to Lushai Hills District to be construed as reference to Mizo District.
